summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BioLens web app. Backend APIs are 100% functional with all endpoints working correctly. Frontend UI loaded successfully with proper navigation, search functionality, and responsive design. All major user flows tested including search, results display, material exploration, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (/api/)
Search functionality for 'polyester hoodie' - returns Petro-Based, High risk with 4 alternatives (hemp, linen, wool, organic cotton)
Search functionality for 'bamboo rayon dress' - returns Transition Material, Medium risk
Search functionality for 'hemp shirt' - returns Plant-Based, Low risk with no alternatives needed
Search for unknown products returns proper 'not found' state
GET /api/materials returns all 26 materials with proper structure
GET /api/search/popular returns 8 example searches
Homepage loads with hero section, search bar, 6 example search chips, 3 explainer cards, and CTA section
Search bar accepts input and navigates to /results?q=query correctly
Example search chips (polyester hoodie, bamboo rayon dress, etc.) navigate to results page
Results page shows proper material classification, risk levels, explanations, and alternatives
Results page displays 'Material not recognized' state for unknown products
Find Better Materials CTA on results page links to /explore
How It Works page loads with all 4 steps and proper content
Explore Materials page loads 26 materials from API
All filter buttons work (All: 26, Petro-Based: 8, Plant-Based: 7, Transition: 4, Natural: 3, Mineral: 3)
Navbar links work correctly (Home, Explore Materials, How It Works)
Mobile hamburger menu works on small viewport
Mobile navigation links function properly
Logo navigation back to homepage
Back button functionality from results page
Homepage CTAs work (How it Works scroll, Explore Materials navigation)
